resume:
# Derek Huynen

**Senior AI Engineer | Full-Stack Developer | Technical Lead**

Reno, NV (Remote / Open to Relocation) | derek.huynen@gmail.com
[linkedin.com/in/derekhuynen](https://linkedin.com/in/derekhuynen) | [github.com/derekhuynen](https://github.com/derekhuynen) | [derekhuynen.com](https://derekhuynen.com)

---

## Summary

Senior AI and Full-Stack Engineer with 6+ years delivering production systems across Generative AI, cloud architecture, and enterprise product development. Deep expertise in RAG pipelines, AI chatbots, and intelligent document processing with Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Search, and Semantic Kernel - hands-on from React/TypeScript frontends through C#/.NET backends. Proven technical leader who leads an 18–21 person cross-platform engineering team at T-Mobile and led a GitHub Copilot rollout that grew adoption to roughly 6,000 developers.

---

## Technical Skills

**AI / GenAI:** RAG, Azure OpenAI, Semantic Kernel, Azure AI Search, Prompt Engineering, Multi-Agent Orchestration, LLMs, MCP Servers, GitHub Copilot, Document Intelligence

**Frontend:** React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Next.js, Zustand, Redux, Redux-Saga, WebSockets, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, Web Components, Storybook, Chart.js

**Backend:** C#, .NET, Node.js, Azure Functions, REST APIs, WebSocket Streaming

**Cloud & Data:** Azure (Functions, CosmosDB, PostgreSQL, Blob Storage, AI Search, OpenAI, Document Intelligence, API Management, Event Hub, App Service, DevOps, Private Endpoints, Azure AD), MySQL, Docker

**Leadership:** Technical Leadership, Team Leadership, System Design & Architecture, Value Stream Mapping, Agile, Developer Training & Workshops

---

## Experience

### IBM - Senior Software Engineer

**Jun 2025 – Present | Remote**
_Deployed to T-Mobile as Lead Solution Engineer across two engagements._

**T-Mobile, Arrow Design System - Lead Solution Engineer** _(Nov 2025 – Present)_

- Technical lead of an 18–21 person cross-platform engineering team delivering Arrow, T-Mobile's enterprise design system, across web, iOS, and Android.
- Own the web platform end-to-end: reviewing components and merge requests, maintaining the SDK, and building the CI/CD pipelines.
- Serve as primary client interface with T-Mobile leadership and a large design organization, covering planning and coordination.
- Built an MCP server exposing live design-system documentation to AI coding tools, easing component adoption for downstream teams.
- **Stack:** Web Components, Storybook, Swift, Kotlin, CI/CD, MCP Servers

**T-Mobile, Enterprise GitHub Copilot Rollout - Senior Lead Developer** _(Jun 2025 – Oct 2025)_

- Led T-Mobile's enterprise GitHub Copilot rollout as delivery and technical lead of a small cross-functional team, partnering directly with senior IT leadership.
- Grew adoption to roughly 6,000 developers and substantially increased daily and weekly active usage.
- Built automated self-service access management (Microsoft Teams bot, Azure Function, Azure AD group) plus a live leadership metrics dashboard.
- Ran value stream mapping to baseline SDLC lead/cycle times and delivered tailored Copilot training workshops.
- **Stack:** Azure Functions, Azure AD, Microsoft Teams bot, GitHub Copilot

### Neudesic, an IBM Company - Senior Consultant

**May 2022 – Jun 2025 | Remote / Hybrid**
_Delivered enterprise AI and full-stack solutions for clients across healthcare, utilities, publishing, and telecom._

**PG&E, GenAI Regulatory Chatbot - AI Developer** _(Jan 2025 – Mar 2025)_

- Core engineer on a proof-of-concept enterprise RAG chatbot letting staff query regulatory, claims, and compliance documents with grounded, cited answers.
- Led the ingestion/vectorization workstream and built the RAG retrieval flow with Azure OpenAI and Azure AI Search; integrated Semantic Kernel (C#/.NET) and real-time WebSocket streaming.
- **Stack:** Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Search, Semantic Kernel, C#/.NET, React, WebSockets

**Sedgwick, Copilot Enablement & Value Stream Mapping - Developer Productivity Engineer** _(Apr 2025 – Jun 2025)_

- Led GitHub Copilot enablement and value stream mapping to establish a productivity baseline ahead of org-wide AI adoption, building a reusable onboarding curriculum and training pilot teams (.NET, React).
- Delivered a baseline value-stream map quantifying current workflow cost - findings that directly won follow-on AI work.

**HarperCollins, Book Catalog RAG Chatbot - Lead Developer** _(Jun 2024 – Aug 2024)_

- Lead developer for the ingestion and retrieval layer of a RAG chatbot over HarperCollins's catalog (500 books); built the ingestion pipeline and a retrieval engine using semantic search and LLM multi-agent orchestration.
- Engineered hybrid retrieval blending vector similarity with metadata filtering for precise, multi-faceted queries.
- **Stack:** Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Search, Node.js, React, Multi-Agent Orchestration

**Confidential Hospital Claims Agency, Document Processing - Lead Developer & Architect** _(Aug 2024 – Dec 2024)_

- Sole developer on a document-processing proof-of-concept that ingested hospital rate sheets from three hospitals (nine PDF formats) into a single normalized database, building parsing plugins on Azure Document Intelligence (OCR) hardened against years of edge-case document errors.
- POC success helped win a larger follow-on engagement.
- **Stack:** Node.js, TypeScript, Azure Document Intelligence, CosmosDB

**AMN Healthcare - Software Engineer (Full-Stack, Frontend-focused)** _(Oct 2022 – Jun 2024)_

- Built production frontends across AMN's nationwide nurse-staffing platform - the shift-booking workflow (complex multi-step forms, advanced filtering) and the One Credentialing rules engine (admin portal + auditing dashboards) serving hundreds of partner hospitals.
- Delivered within a ~15-team enterprise program using React, Redux/Redux-Saga, Material UI, and C#/.NET.

### Gexbot - Frontend Engineer (Freelance) · 2023 – Present

- Rebuilt the [gexbot.com](https://gexbot.com) frontend from static 10-second chart images into a real-time React options-analytics app now serving a 10,000+ trader community.
- Designed custom, data-dense charts (Chart.js) and added live market-data streaming over WebSockets.
- Refactored state management from Redux/Redux-Saga to Zustand, cutting complexity and improving performance.
- **Stack:** React, TypeScript, WebSockets, Zustand, Chart.js

### Pines Cabin Rentals - Founder & Developer · Jan 2019 – May 2022

- Founded and ran a 20+ property vacation-rental business (5-star Airbnb, 100+ reviews) while self-teaching software development - building the booking website and automation for booking reconciliation and cleaning schedules.

---

## Education

**Bachelor's Degree** - California State University, Long Beach

---
